title: Reminders
highlight: Reminders — tell Dumpty to remind you about an idea and it'll notify you at the right time.
features: Ask Dumpty to remind you about an idea — say something like "remind me tomorrow evening" and it'll send you a notification at the right time
fixes: Signing in with an email link now works correctly
Fixed the app asking for microphone access unexpectedly

title: Polish and fixes
features: Coming soon — peek at the features we're building next, from the Account tab
improvements: Your ideas now open instantly from the library
Smarter, more consistent tags on every idea

title: Dumpty is here
features: Record a voice idea and get a clean, titled, organized transcript back
Library with search, tags, and pinning
Action plans — turn any idea into a step-by-step checklist
Works offline and installs as an app
Try it as a guest, no account needed
